task_completion.description: Navigate to the facilities administration page in LibreHealth EHR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR interface is visible, showing the 'Facilities' or 'Clinic' administration section.

task_completion.description: Enter the facility name, phone, and fax numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form fields filled with Name 'Lakewood Family Health Center', Phone '(303) 555-0147', and Fax '(303) 555-0148'.
Form fields filled with Street '456 Wadsworth Boulevard', City 'Lakewood', State 'CO', Zip/Postal Code '80226', and Country 'US'.

task_completion.description: Enter the facility tax, NPI, taxonomy, and POS codes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form fields filled with Federal Tax ID (EIN) '84-3127856', Facility NPI '1234567893', Taxonomy '261QP2300X', and POS Code '11'.

task_completion.description: Configure the facility billing, service, and color settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes checked for 'Billing Location', 'Accepts Assignment', and 'Service Location'. The color field is set to '#3BB9FF' (a cyan-blue color).
A success message indicating the facility was added, or 'Lakewood Family Health Center' appearing as a saved entry in the facilities list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the LibreHealth EHR graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the LibreHealth EHR application, not terminal commands (like curl) or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the facility entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer console or inspector is open to manipulate the DOM.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the actual LibreHealth EHR facility form fields, not a notepad or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The facility name 'Lakewood Family Health Center' is a real entity, and Lakewood, CO 80226 is a valid location. Taxonomy '261QP2300X' is a valid code for Primary Care Clinic. POS '11' is a valid code for Office. Color '#3BB9FF' is a cyan-blue color. Look for these exact values in the LibreHealth EHR facility form.
